title: duwach #1740
definition:
1) to rinse, cleanse away by rinsing, cast out, purge, wash, washing
    1a) (Hiphil)
        1a1) to rinse
        1a2) to cleanse (by washing) (fig.)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to rinse, cleanse away by rinsing, cast out, purge, wash, washing
    1a) (Hiphil)
        1a1) to rinse
        1a2) to cleanse (by washing) (fig.)

    NASB:  to rinse, cleanse away by rinsing or washing
